## New Endpoints

### [POST /api/example]

**Purpose:** [What this endpoint does]

**Request:**
```json
{
  "field": "type — description"
}
```

**Response (200):**
```json
{
  "id": "string",
  "field": "type — description"
}
```

**Error Responses:**

| Status | Code | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| 400 | VALIDATION_ERROR | [When/why] |
| 404 | NOT_FOUND | [When/why] |
| 409 | CONFLICT | [When/why] |
